perturbation.original_text: Upon receipt of a written request to the undersigned, the undersigned and its Representatives shall promptly return to BDO any and all Information received, printed, downloaded or otherwise copied together with personal notes including written materials an d any notes of verbal conversations with representatives from Baldwin or BDO obtained in the course of any investigation and/or inspection of the business and the Assets being offered for sale;
perturbation.changed_text: Upon receipt of a written request to the undersigned, the undersigned and its Representatives shall promptly return to BDO any and all Information received, printed, downloaded or otherwise copied. Personal notes including written materials and notes of verbal conversations with representatives from Baldwin or BDO obtained in the course of any investigation and/or inspection of the business and the Assets being offered for sale, may be retained.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text introduces an in-text contradiction by stating that while all Information must be returned, personal notes, including notes of verbal conversations, may be retained. This creates ambiguity regarding what constitutes 'Information' and what can be kept, leading to potential disputes and uncertainty in enforcing the return of confidential materials.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Upon receipt of a written request to the undersigned, the undersigned and its Representatives shall promptly return to BDO any and all Information received, printed, downloaded or otherwise copied. Personal notes including written materials and notes of verbal conversations with representatives from Baldwin or BDO obtained in the course of any investigation and/or inspection of the business and the Assets being offered for sale, may be retained.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces an in-text contradiction. The original text states that all Information, including personal notes, must be returned. The changed text alters this by stating that personal notes 'may be retained'. This directly conflicts with the contradicted text which is identical to the changed text, because it creates an ambiguity about what needs to be returned and what can be kept, violating the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition.

perturbation.original_text: The undersigned acknowledges and agrees with the statements, disclaimers, and terms and conditions of the Legal Terms of Use and Disclaimer set -out in Appendix “ A”;
perturbation.changed_text: The undersigned acknowledges and agrees with the statements, disclaimers, and terms and conditions of the Legal Terms of Use and Disclaimer set -out in Appendix “ B”;
perturbation.explanation: This change creates an in-text contradiction by referring to Appendix 'B' instead of Appendix 'A', where the Legal Terms of Use and Disclaimer are actually located. This discrepancy introduces confusion and makes it unclear which set of disclaimers and terms the parties are bound by, potentially invalidating the agreement's disclaimers.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The undersigned acknowledges and agrees with the statements, disclaimers, and terms and conditions of the Legal Terms of Use and Disclaimer set -out in Appendix “ B”;
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the appendix referenced for the Legal Terms of Use and Disclaimer from 'A' to 'B'. The contradicted text repeats the changed text, referencing Appendix 'B'. The perturbation explanation highlights that the actual Legal Terms are in Appendix 'A', thus creating an in-text contradiction because the agreement now points to the wrong appendix for critical legal terms. This creates uncertainty about which terms the parties are bound by, satisfying the definition of inconsistencies leading to in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Any transaction will be subject to an approval and vesting order of the Superior Court of Justice (Commercial List).
perturbation.changed_text: Any transaction will be subject to an approval and vesting order of the Superior Court of Justice (Civil List).
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by changing the approval and vesting order from the Superior Court of Justice (Commercial List) to (Civil List). Making the contract dispute, because it creates uncertainty whether the commercial list court or civil court would be the correct one. This affects the contract and creates possible disputes over the final approval.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Any transaction will be subject to an approval and vesting order of the Superior Court of Justice (Civil List).
perturbation.justification: The original text specified that any transaction would be subject to an approval and vesting order of the Superior Court of Justice (Commercial List). The changed text modifies this to the Superior Court of Justice (Civil List). The contradicted text, 'Any transaction will be subject to an approval and vesting order of the Superior Court of Justice (Civil List)', now aligns with the changed text, but this creates a contradiction with the original text, since the original text specified the commercial list and the contradicted text specified the civil list. This introduces an inconsistency, as it is unclear whether the commercial list or civil list court should be used, leading to a dispute over the final approval, which aligns with the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition.
